# Resoluto Sandbox

> The store-mediated, Kata-isolated execution substrate — a passive, self-reporting sandbox that rendezvous with the host through a durable store.

## Overview

- [Home](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/0.1.0-rc4/index.md)

## Usage

- [Getting Started](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/0.1.0-rc4/getting-started/index.md)
- [Concepts](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/0.1.0-rc4/concepts/index.md)
- [Protocol](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/0.1.0-rc4/protocol/index.md)
- [Examples](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/0.1.0-rc4/examples/index.md)
- [Backends](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/0.1.0-rc4/backends/index.md)
- [Networking](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/0.1.0-rc4/networking/index.md)
- [Concurrency](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/0.1.0-rc4/concurrency/index.md)
- [Credentials](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/0.1.0-rc4/auth/index.md)
- [Versioning](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/0.1.0-rc4/versioning/index.md)

- [Runtime & Contracts](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/0.1.0-rc4/api/runtime/index.md)
